fields.name: domain
fields.label: Okta Domain
fields.description: Okta org domain to verify and persist in the connector config.

fields.name: token
fields.label: Okta API Token
fields.description: Optional direct token value for setup. This is masked in the composer and redacted from persisted run metadata.

fields.name: tokenEnv
fields.label: Token Environment Variable
fields.description: Environment variable name that holds the Okta API token. The token value itself is not stored in the config.
